metadataEnricher.description: Fetches metadata from Goodreads via autocomplete API and book page scraping

httpAccess.description: Calls Goodreads autocomplete API, fetches book pages, and provides cover image URLs

splitSubtitle.label: Split Subtitle from Title
splitSubtitle.description: When enabled, splits the title on the first colon into separate title and subtitle fields. Disable for books where the colon is part of the title (e.g. "Star Wars: From the Adventures of Luke Skywalker").
